tasks.title: Prove TigerBeetle static C ABI compatibility

submission.summary: Prove the official unmodified TigerBeetle 0.17.7 static C client can be consumed from Zig 0.15.2 on Windows 11 x64 with bounded shutdown containment.

acceptanceEvidence.command: Pinned Zig 0.15.2 ReleaseSafe consumer build plus PE import/archive inspection
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: rebuilt executable hash matched the report, archive contained tb_client_init/tb_client_submit/tb_client_deinit, and no tb_client.dll import or string was present

acceptanceEvidence.command: Run lookup, unavailable-server timeout, and explicit shutdown against TigerBeetle 0.17.7 on 127.0.0.1
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: lookup returned one callback and result_size=0; unavailable and shutdown paths returned callback status 5 with one callback and successful cleanup

acceptanceEvidence.command: Run injected stalled-deinit parent/child fixture
acceptanceEvidence.result: PASS: child exited with code 7 after watchdog timeout, parent observed wall_ms=10050 under 12 seconds, and no surviving process remained

residualRisks: macOS Intel, macOS ARM, and Linux native support remain deferred by ADR-0011 and are not approved by this review.
The fake stalled-deinit case proves the required process-boundary behavior for an injected stall; production still depends on later API/supervisor tasks implementing ADR-0011 exit-7 handling exactly.
Existing unrelated untracked FEAS-001 files and spikes/tigerbeetle-c/.zig-cache/ are outside this reviewed staged revision and were not evaluated for approval.
